message.content:
Thoroughly explore this Java project to understand its structure, tech stack, and conventions. I need to generate a CLAUDE.md file.

Find out:
1. Project structure (main packages, modules)
2. Tech stack (Spring Boot version, database, message queue, etc.)
3. Build tool and commands (Maven/Gradle)
4. Key dependencies from build files
5. Code conventions (naming, patterns like DDD/MVC)
6. Any existing README or documentation
7. Test framework and how to run tests
8. Configuration files (application.yml, etc.)
9. What does this project do (business domain)
10. Any notable integrations (Nextcloud, RabbitMQ, etc.)

Be very thorough - check build.gradle or pom.xml, main application class, package structure, config files, etc.
